goal: DNA Editor list population — read the four gene states into the scaffolded 44.5-11 pane. **DNA**: enumerate `.claude/skills/` (or the per-runtime skills dir) in the current project, read SKILL.md frontmatter for name/description/status. **Expressed**: enumerate `.gad-try/<slug>/` sandboxes in cwd, read PROVENANCE.md for source/kind/staged_on and ENTRY.md for the handoff prompt. **Mutations**: enumerate `.planning/proto-skills/<slug>/`, read PROVENANCE status + SKILL.md name + VALIDATION.md verdict. **Shed**: enumerate shed-score data (when 42.2-33 battery output is available) and manually-flagged entries. Each row renders with state-appropriate metadata badges and a cid derived from the slug (literal-prototype comment for grep-ability). No actions wired yet — pure read + render. File-system adapter extends 44.5-03's round-trip primitive. Per decision gad-198.
